scripts.dev: npm run build -w @ferreteria/calculation-engine && concurrently -n engine,api,web -c auto "npm run dev -w @ferreteria/calculation-engine" "npm run start:dev -w @ferreteria/api" "npm run dev -w @ferreteria/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @ferreteria/calculation-engine && npm run build -w @ferreteria/api && npm run build -w @ferreteria/web
scripts.start:railway: npm run db:migrate:deploy && concurrently -n api,web "npm run start -w @ferreteria/api" "npm run start -w @ferreteria/web"
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @ferreteria/calculation-engine && npm run typecheck -w @ferreteria/api && npm run typecheck -w @ferreteria/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @ferreteria/api && npm run lint -w @ferreteria/web
